unavailableComparisons.reason: A current map plus historical crash observations is not a historical street world. A separately pinned and validated 2019 world pack is required.
Published plans are not built infrastructure. A declared plan scenario must be compiled separately from observed map facts.

claimBoundary: Only snapshots marked executable may enter matched counterfactual runs. Crash history, planned infrastructure, and current geometry never silently substitute for a dated world.
